Event: Spring Festival 2026
Event Date: 01/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AX30
Forest Keeper Axe

When attacking, has a 50% chance of dealing 190% splash damage.

Once in a while, the unit freezes all enemies in a large radius around self for 4 sec. During that time, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 4 sec. As well,
5 random positive effects are removed from each enemy unit that is frozen or affected with deep freeze, and these units receive pure damage equal to 225% of the axe wielder's physical armor. This damage ignores shields
and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements: 98-100
